name: obsidian
description: BenAI Obsidian Plugin — Turn any folder into an AI-powered operating system with persistent memory, task management, meeting intelligence, daily routines, and multiple output styles. Includes /os-setup (bootstrap + onboarding), /os-optimizer (22-pass vault audit), /os-operator (scheduled second-brain routines), /vault-mcp (self-hosted Relay MCP on Railway), /team-os (BenAI Relay fork install for shared team vaults), and /assistant (sessions, daily routines, output styles, meeting intelligence). Two modes: Solopreneurs/Professionals and Business/Teams.
